mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admin_ad_campaign WHERE active = 1 AND (surface = #{surface} OR surface = 'ALL') AND (starts_at IS NULL OR starts_at <= NOW()) AND (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at >= NOW()) ORDER BY priority ASC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_ad_campaign SET title = #{title}, body = #{body}, surface = #{surface}, placement = #{placement}, creative_type = #{creativeType}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, target_url = #{targetUrl}, visible_to_plans_json = CAST(#{visibleToPlansJson} AS JSON), starts_at = #{startsAt}, ends_at = #{endsAt}, priority = #{priority}, active = #{active}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ad_impression_log (campaign_id, user_id, surface, event_type) VALUES (#{campaignId}, #{userId}, #{surface}, #{eventType})
